title: Lootborne Demo
description: Lootborne is a dark fantasy desktop autobattler. Build your character, loot gear, push through PvE stages, and challenge other players in async PvP duels while battle rages at the edge of your screen.

title: Mr. Nice Guy Demo
description: Play as the Final Girl and explore a haunted children's hospital in this PSX-style fixed-camera survival horror inspired by "Fatal Frame" and "Resident Evil". Hunt anomalies through a CCTV camera loop similar to "I'm on Observation Duty". Unravel an unsettling mystery, and escape a glitching entity.

title: 匣中少女的第二次末日 Demo
description: Infinite flow × mild horror × ensemble visual novel. Join this doomsday carnival together with the young girls~

title: Beyond Hatred Demo
description: Beyond Hatred (Demo) is a 2D ARPG where you follow Daran on his quest to rescue Alexia. Fight enemies, overcome obstacles, and gear up to survive in a hostile world filled with danger and challenges at every step.

title: Cursor Kingdom Demo
description: Record your actions and turn them into workers. Build an automated kingdom of cursor clones, optimize production chains, and survive enemy raids.

title: Tomo Cafe Demo
description: Tomo Cafe is a cozy, narrative-driven productivity game set in a relaxing study cafe. Set your real-life to-do list, work alongside energetic and chaotic focus buddies, and unlock heartfelt stories as you check off your goals.

title: Pinball Millionaire Demo
description: Pinball Millionaire is a physics-based marble simulation game. Let marbles bounce repeatedly off various objects to keep boosting your score, and finally guide them into the highest-multiplier scoring zone. Use the rewards you earn to upgrade and enhance the map continuously.

title: Neko Miko Kaibyo Shioki no Emaki Demo
description: "Neko Miko Kaibyo Shioki no Emaki" is an arcade-style action game where both allies and enemies are cats. Control the cat shrine maiden and her cat companions with the joystick, and run through the stages while defending against the fierce attacks of the monstrous cats with your feline companions.
